config.user_description: The Chancen list shows individual opportunity values but there is no total anywhere. Please add a summary line or header showing the sum of all `wert` values across all Chancen records, displayed on the Chancen list page header.
config.special_instructions: Workflow scope: full — implement, test, review, create a PR, and merge to main. PRD decision: skip the PRD; go straight to plan. Keep planning files: yes. Every checkpoint: choose Continue (or the recommended option). Never stop.
